<highlight index='3' description='The assistant maintains a high degree of instructional fidelity and professional register.'>To combat this, ensure you are explicitly deleting the old chunk variables (`del chunk`) and forcing garbage collection (`import gc; gc.collect()`) at the end of each loop iteration.</highlight>
</highlights>
